description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence and set within a landscaped yard. The structure features a flat roof with bold red trim outlining the roof and entryways, and large horizontal windows that wrap around the building, allowing for ample natural light. The front entrance is accentuated by a red-framed portico and a paved walkway leading up to it. The property includes two distinct outdoor areas: a rectangular swimming pool with a paved deck and a smaller water feature with decorative plants. There are exterior staircases leading to the roof and a garage door visible at the rear, suggesting vehicle access. The overall design is geometric and minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, red trim, and landscaped outdoor areas including a pool and water feature, all enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, a paved walkway, and a small water feature with plants.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the garage door, driveway, and the main swimming pool with a paved deck.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the pool, exterior stairs to the roof, and grouped windows along the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the water feature, patio area, and the rear of the bungalow with roof access.
